description: Create a 'Director Index' tiddler tagged 'Index' that dynamically groups and lists films by director. The index must identify all unique directors from tiddlers tagged 'Film' (excluding those tagged 'Play'). For each director, display their name as a Level 2 heading followed by a bulleted list of their films as clickable links. Each film link must be followed by its release year in parentheses, with the list sorted chronologically by the 'release_year' field. The tiddler must be fully dynamic with no hardcoded names or titles.
